fontSubstitution: The source references nine missing 1CamBam Stick fonts. Validation replaces them with the supplied Pixels Medium TTF in both Blender and GN-VM, with embedded outlines as the browser fallback.
validation: All five Blender sweep cases have exact face counts. Vertex counts differ by at most seven (0.06%); authored output is +7 vertices at the 0.00001-unit Merge by Distance threshold. Merge itself is verified exact: applying the VM weld implementation to Blender's pre-merge positions reproduces Blender's 11,971 vertices and every weld cluster. The residual originates earlier in the replacement-font instance path: the 14 sampled path points match Blender, while selected glyph instance position/rotation fields differ before realization (up to 0.000291 units after realization), which perturbs proximity factors and the final threshold weld. Authored bounds differ by at most 0.0245 units; across all five cases the maximum bounds difference is 0.1197 units.
